Thanks for the contribution! Please skim this template and fill in the
relevant bits. Remove sections that do not apply.

Security-sensitive change? Do not file PRs against `main` for
unpatched vulnerabilities — see SECURITY.md for the private channel.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why, in 1–3 sentences. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — build, CI, deps, tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (format, lint, typecheck, tests, schemas, preview, icons)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the behaviour changed
- [ ] Docs updated where directly affected (README / AGENTS / ADR / CHANGELOG)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies, or ADR-0015 implications discussed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, tenant IDs, or usernames in diff or logs

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, follow-ups deferred to a later PR, or risk callouts. -->
